## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Prophecy and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and upcoming deliverables.](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content pipeline: 1 article published, 2 queued, 1 article + 1 ebook in progress](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=32.0)
  - [Initial performance metrics show promising engagement rates (50-81%) for new content](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)
  - [Team discussing how to refine content approach, especially around tool comparisons and buyer guides](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Process improvements needed for streamlining content approval and byline assignment](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)

## Topics

### Content Pipeline and Performance

  - [1 article published (180L), 2 more queued](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=282.0)
  - [This week's deliverables: 1 article, 1 ebook based on webinar](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Initial Google Analytics data:](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [52 total views across 2 articles](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
      - [30 sessions for ELT article, 4 for ETL](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
      - [Strong engagement rates: 50% (ELT), 81% (ETL)](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=392.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [Current report based on Google Analytics due to limited data](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=325.0)
  - [Future reports will include more detailed metrics (impressions, clicks, CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Team discussing setting up custom event tracking for CTA clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### Content Strategy Refinement

  - [Discussing approach for tool comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Balancing search intent (listing tools) with neutral, informative content](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1008.0)
  - [Considering buyer's guide format focusing on selection criteria without direct comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Potential to deprioritize tool comparison articles in favor of foundational content](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Need for streamlined process in assigning bylines and getting approvals](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Discussing options: single byline vs. category-based bylines](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1376.0)
  - [Aim to reduce approval friction while maintaining quality control](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)

### Upcoming Content Review

  - [Team to revisit "Alternatives to Alteryx" article approach](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)
  - [Further discussion needed on "Streamlined Data Integration" article to align with Prophecy's unique value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Vivek and Matt to have follow-up discussion on content strategy and process improvements](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1469.0)
  - [Team to explore setting up custom event tracking in Google Analytics for CTA clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Revisit and potentially revise approach for tool comparison articles](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Schedule deeper dive into "Streamlined Data Integration" article to align with Prophecy's messaging](https://fathom.video/share/Bn2mum-dVDL4z5gsn-yt6sHE4HcPPHEq?tab=summary&timestamp=1506.0)
